destinations.description: Witness the world-famous cherry blossoms reaching peak bloom across the city's parks and shrines.
Explore the vibrant tulip fields at Keukenhof Gardens during their short annual blooming window.
Experience the traditional music, dancing, and colorful festivities of the iconic Feria de Abril.
Celebrate the National Cherry Blossom Festival along the historic Tidal Basin waterfront.
Cool off during the Songkran festival, the nation's massive and joyous water fight celebration.
Enjoy the Eternal City's mild spring temperatures and traditional Easter celebrations with fewer crowds.
Wander through garden oases and bustling markets in the perfect warmth of the African spring.
Experience the romantic charm of the city as its famous gardens burst into seasonal bloom.
Enjoy affordable luxury and sunny Atlantic breezes before the peak summer tourist rush.
Catch the start of the dry season for lush jungle hikes and peaceful spiritual retreats.
